text.title: Serverless Cold Start Optimization Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from content/01-core-rules.xml. The skip-this-methodology branch is always reachable.

decision-tree.root-question: Are all four prerequisites populated (budget, baseline, runtime, bundle)?

text.example: Baseline: cold p99 1800ms (Java 17, 512MB). r2: bundle trim 200ms saved. r3: SnapStart applied → cold p99 450ms. r4: memory bump 1024MB → cold p99 280ms. SLO 300ms met without PC. Cost delta: +6% (memory bump). Spec ready.
